steps.title: Identify the slope using the parallel line
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope. The line $y = 18x + 2$ has slope \$18$, so line $s$ has slope \$18$.

steps.title: Write the equation of line s and find d
steps.content:
Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$ with slope \$18$. Its equation is:
$$y = 18x$$
Substituting the point $(4, d)$:
$$d = 18 \cdot 4 = 72$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
